subject: U4-DIAGNOSTIC-UI ready for test pass
body: Implemented /diagnostic on branch codex/diagnostic-ui. The page now loads existing GET /api/diagnostic?childId=..., walks through 5 maths questions, posts to /api/diagnostic/submit, handles already-complete state, and returns the child to the next learn URL. Dashboard diagnostic badges now jump into /diagnostic?childId=. Please run/extend tests for the diagnostic flow and confirm the UI/contract still match the existing API.
